memoryArtifacts.headline: The family of John Howland, Mayflower passenger: five generations by Hunter, Mardenna Johnson, 1910- pg 1
Mayflower Families Through Five Generations Vol 23 Part I John Howland part 2 of 4
memoryArtifacts.description: If you are related to John Howland and Elizabeth Tilley then you are also related to three other Mayflower Pilgrims, John and Mrs. John Tilley and their daughter, Elizabeth Tilley.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Chipman Thanksgiving Story.mp3
memoryArtifacts.description: Part I - John Howland and Elizabeth Tilley (lst Thanksgiving)..Part II - John Chipman and Hope Howland.. Part III - Reverend John Lathrop...Narrators are Dean and Phyllis Chipman and Ralph and Colleen Chipman.  Recorded 1986.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Signature of John Chipman on a Bond of Administration on the John Howland estate, dated 5 March 1672

popularStory.headline: Elder John Chipman
popularStory.description: John Chipman was 17 when he came to New England in May, 1637, in the service of his cousin Mr. Richard Derby, who settled in Plymouth. He was both brotherless and fatherless when he sailed for New Eng …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Chipman於大約1620年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽智 普德爾時，他的父親Thomas Chipman54歲，母親Ann Agnes Derby54歲。他於1646年與Hope Howland在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1631年移民到美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓並於1704年住在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波桑德維其。他去世於1708年4月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波桑德維其享年89歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波桑德維其笛卡爾 堂 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Chipman于大约1620年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽智 普德爾时，他的父亲Thomas Chipman54岁，母亲Ann Agnes Derby54岁。他于1646年与Hope Howland在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1631年移民到美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓并于1704年住在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波桑德維其。他去世于1708年4月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波桑德維其享年89岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波桑德維其笛卡爾 堂 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Chipman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Chapman
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When John Chipman was born about 1620, in Bryants Puddle, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Chipman, was 54 and his mother, Ann Agnes Derby, was 54. He married Hope Howland in 1646, in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. He immigrated to Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1631 and lived in Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States in 1704. He died on 7 April 1708, in Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 89, and was buried in Old Town Cemetery, Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Chipman est né environ 1620, à Bryants Puddle, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Chipman, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Ann Agnes Derby, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Hope Howland en 1646, à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Il a immigré au Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1631 et a vécu à Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1704. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1708, à Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Old Town Cemetery, Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Chipman um 1620 in Bryants Puddle, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Chipman 54 und seine Mutter Ann Agnes Derby 54. Er hat 1646 in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Hope Howland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er ist 1631 nach Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten eingewandert. 1704 hat er in Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 7. April 1708 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Town Cemetery, Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Chipman è nato il circa 1620 nel Bryants Puddle, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Chipman, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Ann Agnes Derby, aveva 54 anni. Lui sposato Hope Howland nel 1646, nel Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Immigrato nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1631 e vissuto a Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1704. Morì il 7 aprile 1708, nel Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Town Cemetery, Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Chipmanが約1620年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリアンツ プウッドルで生まれた時，父Thomas Chipmanは54歳，母Ann Agnes Derbyは54歳であった。1646年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスプリモウスでHope Howlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1631年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンに移住し，1704年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルサンドウィチに住んでいた。彼は1708年4月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルサンドウィチで89歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルサンドウィチオルド トウン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Chipman(이)가 대략 1620년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아츠 푸들일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Chipman(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Agnes Derby(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1646년 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 플림우스에서 Hope Howland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1631년에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴로 이민을 떠났고, 1704년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 샌드위치에서 살았다. 그는 1708년 4월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 샌드위치에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 샌드위치 드 타운 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Chipman nasceu aproximadamente 1620, em Bryants Puddle, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Chipman, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Ann Agnes Derby, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Hope Howland em 1646, em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1631 e viveu em Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1704. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1708, em Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Town Cemetery, Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Chipman родился около 1620 г. в местности брянц пуддл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Chipman было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Agnes Derby, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Hope Howland в 1646 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1631 году, а также жил в местности сэндвич, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1704 году. Он умер 7 апреля 1708 г. в местности сэндвич, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности олд тоун кеметири, сэндвич, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Chipman nació aproximadamente 1620, en Bryants Puddle, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Chipman, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Ann Agnes Derby, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Hope Howland en 1646, en Plymouth, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Inmigró a Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1631 y vivió en Sandwich, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1704. Murió el 7 de abril de 1708, en Sandwich, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en Old Town Cemetery, Sandwich, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
